mnemonics.title: PAPA
mnemonics.content: Public Access from anywhere, Protected Access from same Package and subClasses, default (no modifier) Access from same Package, private Access only from own class

mnemonics.title: PEAS
mnemonics.content: Public Everywhere, Encapsulation with private fields, Access modifiers define Scope, Same package access with no modifier

mnemonics.title: PUPPY
mnemonics.content: Public Unrestricted, Protected Under same Package and subclasses, Private You can't access from outside, Package-private You can access from same package
